# ID-10: start-session skill self-adaptation + diary-entry shape guidance

Adapt .claude/skills/start-session/SKILL.md to reflect the post-S50 SDLC workflow conventions: drop track-prefixed session counter + per-track primer references; replace STATUS-file workflow references with task-list.json fields + mempalace diary entry guidance; add a section documenting the diary-entry shape for cross-session consistency.

## Acceptance criteria

- Track-prefixed session counter references removed (Q-COUNTER-1).
- Per-track primer (docs/tracks/*.md) references removed (Q-WORKTREES-2).
- STATUS-file references replaced with task-list + mempalace diary guidance (Q3).
- NEW section: Mempalace diary entry shape — AAAK convention.
- Skill body remains under ~250 lines.
